title: Craftive
summary: One platform. Every configuration. Blogs, HR portals, e-commerce or corporate sites — all powered by a single infrastructure.
description: Craftive is a configurable multi-tenant platform (Clean Architecture) shipped as a monorepo: backend (Spring Boot 3.3, Java 21), Angular 19 admin under storefront, and a headless Next.js App Router reference storefront under storefront-nextjs — plus docker and docs. Database-per-tenant isolation uses Flyway migrations and tenant-scoped routing with HikariCP pools. The Angular admin uses Signals, RxJS, Material, ApexCharts, and Quill; public storefronts fork the shared Next.js base so only the theme layer changes. APIs are protected with Spring Security, JWT, OWASP-focused sanitization, and Resilience4j rate limiting; tests use JUnit 5 and Testcontainers. CI/CD runs on GitHub Actions, served via Cloudflare, hosted on DigitalOcean.
detail: Tenant routing maps each host to an isolated schema with per-tenant Flyway migrations. The Spring layer owns JWT auth, validation, and tenant context; the Angular admin leans on Signals for UI state and RxJS for API streams. Storefronts share one Next.js contract so themes can change without breaking the CMS pipeline. CI/CD on GitHub Actions deploys to DigitalOcean behind Cloudflare with cache and security policies aligned to production traffic.

title: yemredev.com
summary: AI-powered multilingual portfolio with Next.js App Router and a live chat assistant.
description: A personal portfolio site built with Next.js 16 App Router, featuring full EN/TR internationalization, a dark/light theme, and an AI chat assistant powered by GPT-4o mini via the Vercel AI SDK. The site serves as both a showcase and a live project.
